disable_warning: The module will be disabled and removed from the sidebar.
extensions_exists: A module or extension named :module already exists.
extensions_installer_hint: Install signed modules and extensions from a ZIP package. Extensions are installed in app/Extensions.
extensions_installer_hint_file: Only valid ZIP files are accepted (module.json or extension.json required).
extensions_manifest_invalid: Invalid manifest. Check the module name and package structure.
extensions_manifest_missing: No valid manifest (module.json or extension.json) found in this package.
extensions_manifest_official: Official FlatCMS packages must include a signature.
extensions_openssl_missing: The OpenSSL extension is required to verify official packages.
extensions_public_key_missing: The official public key is missing. Configure it before installing an official package.
extensions_zip_extract_failed: Unable to extract the ZIP archive.
extensions_zip_invalid: The ZIP archive contains invalid paths.
extensions_zip_missing: The ZIP extension is not available on this server.
extensions_zip_open_failed: Unable to open the ZIP archive.
extensions_zip_outside_scope: The package tries to write outside its folder. Installation blocked.
module_desc_backups: Site data backup and restore manager.
module_disable_first: Disable the module before deleting it.
module_invalid_state: This package is invalid or incomplete. Review its manifest and declared runtime paths.
module_legacy_disable_hint: This legacy module can be disabled because :module is active.
module_required_error: This module is required and cannot be disabled.
modules_empty_text: No additional module is available in this column right now.
modules_filter_empty_text: No module matches the current combination. Adjust the filters or clear the search.
modules_help_intro: Filter the list, review dependencies, then install or enable the modules the project actually needs.
modules_help_step_dependencies: Before disabling a module, always review its dependencies and locked modules.
modules_help_step_filters: Start by filtering by status, type, or location to isolate the right module.
modules_help_step_install: Install a signed ZIP from the installer card when an extension is not present yet.
modules_help_title: Enable only what the site needs
module_sidebar_not_manageable_error: :module does not expose a manageable sidebar entry.
